How to Add ESLint to a Vue Vite Project
This post walks through adding ESLint to a Vue Vite project, using the Airbnb or Standard style guide.
How to Switch ESLint Style (Standard → Airbnb) Without Losing Your Mind

When you build a project you'll almost always reach for a style manager to keep everyone's code consistent — on the frontend that's ESLint. The thing is, once you've picked a style at the start, switching to a different one later is a pain. So here's how to move ESLint from the Standard style over to Airbnb.
Add ESLint to Your Project in Five Minutes (Airbnb vs Standard vs Google)

This post walks through how to add a JavaScript style manager to your own project. If you want your project's code to have a baseline level of quality, ESLint is basically a must-have. We'll install it, run through the init questions, and compare the Airbnb, Standard, and Google style guides.
